scripts.build: CHROME_PATH="${CHROME_PATH:-$(command -v chromium-browser || command -v google-chrome || command -v chromium || command -v firefox)}" marp --allow-local-files --browser-timeout 120 --theme-set ../css/dr-iissi.css --engine ../scripts/marp-engine.js --pdf templates.md
scripts.watch: CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHROME_PATH="${CHROME_PATH:-$(command -v chromium-browser || command -v google-chrome || command -v chromium || command -v firefox)}" marp --watch --allow-local-files --browser-timeout 120 --theme-set ../css/dr-iissi.css --engine ../scripts/marp-engine.js --pdf templates.md
